positive: A cosmic adventure scene featuring a stylized, friendly astronaut floating among vibrant nebulae and bioluminescent cosmic flora. The astronaut, rendered in a clean, minimalist style, is exploring a landscape composed of geometric crystalline structures and gentle, curved energy streams. The composition should be centrally focused, utilizing strong silhouettes and high contrast between the dark space background and the glowing, saturated colors of the nebula (deep purples, electric blues, glowing teal, and magenta). The style is modern sci-fi vector art mixed with detailed digital illustration. Crisp lines, graphic quality, optimized for apparel print. Cinematic volumetric lighting, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, low resolution, amateur, noise, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, grainy, signature, logo, copyright
